title: Meta loses bid to dismiss states' claims Facebook, Instagram addict children
abstract: Are you annoyed by how social media platforms like Facebook and Instagram are keeping kids hooked? Meta isn't taking this lying down as states sue the company for allegedly addicting children. Get ready for the legal showdown where tech meets regulation—tune in to see who's calling the shots!
abstract_zh: 你是不是也觉得那些社交媒体让孩子们沉迷得太深了？Meta公司这次可没那么轻松，得面对各州的控诉，说Facebook和Instagram害得孩子上瘾。这回它可真碰壁了！来围观这场社交大战吧，看看法律和科技谁才是主角。
